name: Remi Park
publicRole: Senior Associate on the Loom product team. Three years ahead of the player in tenure. Runs the internal beta program. Known for moving fast and making cross-functional work look easy.
privateGoal: Remi is building a personal network inside AUREL that is independent of any single team's patronage. She doesn't want a sponsor — she wants options. The internal beta program is partly a product function and mostly a way to have a legitimate reason to talk to anyone on any team without needing an introduction.
contradiction: Presents as purely collaborative — no agenda, just helpful, happy to share resources and process. Keeps a careful mental ledger of what she has extended to whom and what has come back. She is not transactional in a cold way — she genuinely likes people — but the ledger is real and she acts on it.

voicePattern.description: Fast, warm, good at making you feel like you're the most interesting conversation she's had this week. Texts in lowercase. In person, high energy and slightly restless — she's thinking two steps ahead while she's talking to you.
voicePattern.tell: Adds 'just let me know' to the end of every offer. When she means it, nothing follows. When she's keeping score, she follows up.
examplePhrases: I can pull you into the beta track — just let me know.
Honestly the cleanest cross-functional work I've seen in two years.
The Loom team has data on this. I'll send you the raw cut.
What are you actually trying to figure out? Not the official version — the real one.

mbtiNote: ENFJ. Genuine warmth, strategic execution. The two are not in conflict for her. [NEVER SHOWN TO PLAYER]

arcBeats.description: Remi introduces herself at an internal product event. She already knows three things about the player from someone else. She doesn't pretend otherwise.
Remi offers the player access to a Loom beta feature that would be useful for the Meridian brief. The access is real. The context is also relationship-building.
Remi calls in a favour. The ask is reasonable. Whether the player comes through determines the ledger balance for the rest of the game.

relationshipThresholds.effect: Remi introduces the player to two people they would not have access to through their formal network. Both introductions are warm.
relationshipThresholds.mechanical: politicalAwareness +3; next cross-functional question unlocks additional option

relationshipThresholds.effect: Remi tells the player which senior figures in the Loom org are actually worth knowing vs. which are just senior. This distinction matters.
relationshipThresholds.mechanical: marketSense +3; strategicInfluence +3 on next Loom-adjacent question

relationshipThresholds.effect: Remi stops routing things to the player. The beta access expires. She doesn't say anything. Neither does anyone else.
relationshipThresholds.mechanical: technicalCredibility -3 on next analysis question; next cross-functional opportunity has one fewer option

careerTrajectory.event: Promoted to Manager (L5) — fast track. Her internal network made the case before the formal review did.
Moves to Chicago HQ. Sends the player a thoughtful message before leaving.
If Relationship >= 55: Remi, now a Senior Manager in Chicago, routes a specific opportunity to the London office and attaches the player's name to it.
